discovery.run_summary: Risk-on tape with SMH +3.1% leading on memory/AI strength; small caps outperforming (IWM +1.7%) and VIX -4.8%. Several mid-cap earnings movers worth investigating, notably DOCN's huge gap up, IPGP/OSIS/AEIS/ADEA gap downs, and CYTK biotech surge. Energy mixed despite Strait of Hormuz/Iran headlines.

notable_index_moves: SMH +3.14% on memory rally (Micron $700B mcap headline)
XLB +1.72% materials strong; XLF flat despite KRE +1.34%
TSM -1.81% diverging from semis - watch for catalyst

discoveries.name: DigitalOcean Holdings
discoveries.mechanism: Likely earnings beat / AI inference workload narrative; +61% over 5 days suggests possible guide raise or M&A speculation
discoveries.catalyst: Probable earnings release - need to verify
research_pointers: Confirm earnings results, revenue growth, and AI/GPU droplet revenue contribution
Check if guidance was raised for FY
Review short interest - was this a squeeze candidate?
Compare valuation post-move vs. cloud peers (NET, CFLT)
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If move is purely multiple expansion without fundamental beat, or if it's M&A rumor that fails to materialize

discoveries.name: IPG Photonics
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings disappointment / weak guidance in industrial laser business; sector has structural headwinds from Chinese competition
discoveries.catalyst: Likely Q1 earnings miss or weak Q2 guide
research_pointers: Verify earnings details - revenue, margin trajectory, China exposure
Compare to long-term decline thesis vs. potential cyclical bottom
Net cash position - balance sheet quality after drop
Whether new CEO strategy commentary was negative
discoveries.what_would_falsify: Strong cash position and stabilizing book-to-bill could make this an oversold value play

discoveries.name: Cytokinetics
discoveries.mechanism: Likely binary catalyst - aficamten regulatory/clinical update, FDA action, or partnership/M&A speculation

research_pointers: Check FDA calendar for aficamten PDUFA
M&A rumors - has been long-rumored takeout target
Any CMS/payer coverage news
BMY's Camzyos competitive positioning

discoveries.name: OSI Systems
discoveries.mechanism: Likely earnings disappointment or contract/order pushout in security division (airport/border scanning). Stock had run hard previously
research_pointers: Q3 FY26 earnings results and backlog change
Security division large contract status
Healthcare/Optoelectronics segment performance
Whether Muddy Waters short thesis from prior years has resurfaced

discoveries.name: Advanced Energy Industries
discoveries.mechanism: Notable divergence vs. SMH +3.14% - selling on its own catalyst (likely earnings/guide) while semicap peers rally. Possible misread if guide is conservative but data center power story intact

research_pointers: Data center / hyperscaler power exposure commentary
Semi cap equipment book-to-bill
Compare guide to LRCX/AMAT/KLAC results
Margin trajectory vs. consensus

discoveries.name: Adeia Inc.

Litigation status with Disney, Netflix
Free cash flow and dividend sustainability
Any Chinese OEM license renewals

discoveries.name: GXO Logistics

Organic growth rate vs. peer logistics names

trump_signals.post_summary: Endorsement post for Ohio congressional candidate; reiterates tariff/America First trade policy as positive theme
trump_signals.note: Political endorsement with no specific company or sector action. Tariff mention is generic policy language, not new news. No actionable signal.

discovery.no_signals_note: Most flagged movers appear to be on company-specific earnings catalysts that aren't surfaced in the news feed - Michael should pull 8-Ks/press releases to confirm. The data center infrastructure cluster (ECG/PRIM/POWL) is the most coherent theme worth deeper work.

ai_announcements.headline: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant; Etsy launches native app inside ChatGPT
ai_announcements.summary: OpenAI ships new default model with reduced hallucination in regulated domains; Etsy embeds shopping experience inside ChatGPT, signaling continued ChatGPT-as-platform expansion that could disrupt traditional content/search/commerce intermediaries.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: IAC's Dotdash Meredith could license content to OpenAI (existing deal); search-referral traffic loss is partially offset by direct AI licensing revenue.
research_pointers: Check if IAC reported earnings today (move size suggests earnings, not just AI news)
Dotdash Meredith traffic trends vs ChatGPT referral share
Angi spinoff impacts on remaining IAC NAV

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Pinterest's visual discovery + shopping graph is a defensible AI-era asset; possible move is earnings-driven, not AI-news driven, but Etsy-in-ChatGPT validates conversational commerce thesis Pinterest has been pitching.
research_pointers: Confirm if PINS earnings hit today - 54M volume on 6.8% pop with no headline suggests yes
Pinterest ad-tech AI commentary on call

ai_announcements.headline: ASML CEO bullish; Cerebras heads to $26.6B IPO
ai_announcements.summary: Continued strength in AI infrastructure narrative. Cerebras IPO at high valuation reinforces AI compute demand but also surfaces an Nvidia alternative. IPGP -25.7% and OSIS -17% on volume look earnings-driven, not AI-news driven.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Industrial fiber laser maker - move size and 5x volume strongly suggest earnings miss/guide cut, not AI-news related. Not a rational AI sympathy trade.
research_pointers: Confirm IPGP Q1 earnings release today
China industrial demand commentary
Falsifier: if earnings were in-line, then move is unexplained and worth deeper look

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Advanced Energy supplies power conversion to semicap and data center; AI capex is a tailwind. -10.7% drop likely earnings/guide-driven, NOT a rational AI-fear selloff. Potentially OVERDONE if AI data-center exposure was the bull thesis and guide is just timing.
research_pointers: AEIS Q1 print and data-center segment commentary
Semicap exposure vs ASML's bullish tone today
Falsifier: if industrial/telecom segment showed structural deterioration, drop is justified

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Most large movers today (DOCN +40%, CYTK +17%, OSIS -17%, IPGP -26%, AEIS -11%, PINS, IAC) appear to be earnings-driven rather than reactions to the AI announcements in the news set. DOCN's 40% pop is likely an M&A or blowout earnings event worth investigating separately. No Anthropic announcements in this batch.
